calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2005 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DANIEL STERN FOR PLAINTIFF MINT HALL AND MALL. AGENT RON ROGNESS PRESENT.
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY RUDY BALDERAMA FOR DEFENDANT SLAVADOR BILANGEL AND MILA BILANGEL

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO VACATE 957 MISSION STREET, # 121 ON OR BEFORE 11:59PM 11/30/05. KEYS AND GARAGE DOOR OPENER TO BE RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF. PROPERTY TO BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. LEASE TO BE TERMINATED. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN FEES AND COSTS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. ALL BACK RENT WAIVED. SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE RETURNED TO DEFENDANT AND DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE TO BE FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2 BUSINESS DAYS AFER DEFENDANT VACATES. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH TERMS, PLAINTIFF TO FILE JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION AND FORFEITURE OF LEASE. NO FURTHER STAYS ALLOWED. MOTION CAN BE FILED TO REGAIN FEES AND COSTS OF ENFORCEMENT. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:PETER HADIARIS ;CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: KATHY KOLLENHER (218)
